check_formula_required.name: check_formula_required
check_formula_required.value: (method = 'direct' AND base_price_list_id IS NULL AND formula_type IS NULL AND formula_value IS NULL) OR (method = 'formula' AND base_price_list_id IS NOT NULL AND formula_type IS NOT NULL AND formula_value IS NOT NULL)

check_effective_range.name: check_effective_range
check_effective_range.value: effective_from IS NULL OR effective_to IS NULL OR effective_to >= effective_from

uniq_variants_store_barcode_alive.name: uniq_variants_store_barcode_alive
uniq_variants_store_barcode_alive.where: "product_variants"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND "product_variants"."barcode" IS NOT NULL

uniq_products_store_barcode_alive.name: uniq_products_store_barcode_alive
uniq_products_store_barcode_alive.where: "products"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND "products"."barcode" IS NOT NULL
